top_signals.title: Gold Drops as Traders Watch Iran Tensions for Inflation Outlook
top_signals.summary: Gold fell as the US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other, following tit-for-tat strikes that tested a fragile truce in a war that has fueled global inflationary pressures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New Trimble TMS for Shippers grows directly out of Transporeon acquisition
top_signals.summary:
Trimble is rolling out another new product powered by its purchase of Transporeon.

The post New Trimble TMS for Shippers grows directly out of Transporeon acquisition appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: TD Cowen says crypto market structure bill passage ‘far from assured’ before midterm election
top_signals.summary: The passage of the crypto market structure bill, or Clarity Act, before the November midterm election is "far from assured," said TD Cowen.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Australia gives regulator more power to pursue Big Tech over under-16 social media ban
top_signals.summary: The move ​comes as evidence suggests children are still able to access the platforms six months ‌after the ‌world-first restrictions took effect in December.
